features.name: Flyby
features.description: The wasp doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Sting
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Flying hit-and-run attacker with poison
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Flyby to attack and retreat without provoking
tactical_info.key_abilities: Flyby makes it excellent for harassment tactics
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low HP makes sustained combat dangerous
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect for swarm tactics or supporting ground forces
